title: minkroft Curated™
description: Craft stunning homes & personalize your Minecraft world! Explore unique structures, furnish with exquisite detail, & enjoy optimized performance, shaders, & tons of decorative mods for a truly immersive & personalized building journey.
body:
# minkroft Curated™: The Ultimate Homebuilding & Cosmetic Experience

![Decorated Rooms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f618db08953f014538f7a050eab8bc75464cf570.jpeg)

_**Unleash your inner architect and interior designer with **minkroft Curated™**, the Minecraft modpack dedicated to transforming your world into a personalized paradise. From foundation to finishing touches, craft stunning homes, furnish them with exquisite detail, and express your unique style. **minkroft Curated™** focuses on functional decorative mods like Let's Do and Adorn.**_

**Key Features**:
- Focus on functional decorative mods like Let's Do and Adorn, alongside Farmer's Delight.
- Extensive collection of building blocks and decorative items.
- Diverse furniture options for every style.
- Character customization and visual enhancements.
- Tons of world generation mods adding hundreds of new structures.
- Performance optimizations for smooth gameplay.
- Quality-of-life improvements for a more enjoyable experience.
- Shader support for breathtaking visuals.
- Resource packs included to kickstart gameplay.
- A plethora of smaller mods to enhance every aspect of your gameplay.

## 🏡 Building and Furnishing Your Dream Home
### 🗺️ Enhanced World Generation
With mods that add hundreds of new structures throughout the Overworld, Nether, and End, discover unique locations to establish your dream home. **minkroft Curated™** provides a comprehensive suite of building tools and decorative elements, from a vast selection of blocks, including diagonal windows and reimagined stairs, to medieval-inspired structures and furniture for every style.

![Tavern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d069e16d3e3396cc70eacae7ab1f77b405bff6b0.jpeg)

### ✨ Beautiful and Functional
Fill your world with life using Macaw's Furniture, Another Furniture, and a plethora of other decorative items, creating spaces that are made by you as you desire and imagine, alongside the culinary delights of Farmer's Delight, providing all the tools you need for immersive homebuilding.

![Beer Brewing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13fda08cda603b396ed9283f2d44ea8e13cde099.jpeg)

## 🎨 Personalization and Enhanced Gameplay
### 👤 Personalize Your Experience
With character customization like 3D Skin Layers and Wavey Capes, enhance the visual appeal with shaders like Complementary Shaders and BSL Shaders alongside optimized performance with Sodium, and enjoy visual enhancements like Falling Leaves and Better Lanterns. **minkroft Curated™** also includes resource packs to kickstart your gameplay and provide a fresh visual experience. Beyond aesthetics, **minkroft Curated™** enhances gameplay with quality-of-life improvements.

![Terrain Generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c725d89a0df21d99cd2b5f196d0acc6320b76245.jpeg)

### 🎒 Manage Your Inventory
With Sophisticated Backpacks, explore the world with Waystones, and enjoy smoother gameplay with features like Combat Roll and convenient recipe management with Not Enough Recipe Book. **minkroft Curated™** seamlessly blends functionality and aesthetics, creating a truly immersive and personalized Minecraft experience. Whether you're a seasoned builder or just starting your Minecraft journey, this modpack offers endless possibilities for creating the world of your dreams. Prepare to build, decorate, and design your way to the perfect Minecraft home!

Curated for my dear friends over in **_minkroft_**, with 🤍.
